title: The Delhi Urban Art Commission Act, 1973
full_text: The Delhi Urban Art Commission Act, 1973 दिल्‍ली नागरी कला आयोग अधिनियम,1973 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197401 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 1974-01-01 Act Year: 1974 Short Title: The Delhi Urban Art Commission Act, 1973 Hindi Title: दिल्‍ली नागरी कला आयोग अधिनियम,1973 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of the Delhi Urban Art Commission with a view to preserving, developing and maintaining the aesthetic quality of urban and environmental design within Delhi. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-05-1974 Notification: 1st May, 1974, vide notification No. G.S.R. 189(E), dated the 27th April, 1974, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Delhi Urban Art Commission Act, 1973 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ESTABLISHMENT OF THE COMMISSION CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS AND POWERS OF THE COMMISSION CHAPTER IV FUND, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of the Commission. Section 4. Composition of the Commission. Section 5. Terms and conditions of service of members. Section 6. Meetings of the Commission. Section 7. Vacancies amongst members or defect in constitution not to invalidate acts or proceedings of the Commission. Section 8. Temporary association of persons with the Commission for particular purposes. Section 9. Appointment of staff of the Commission. Section 10. Authentication of orders and other instrument of the Commission. Section 11. Functions of the Commission. Section 12. Duty of local bodies to refer development proposals, etc., to the Commission. Section 13. Appeal to the Central Government in certain cases. Section 14. Power to revise decision in certain cases. Section 15. Powers of the Commission. Section 16. Payment to the Commission. Section 17. Fund of the Commission. Section 18. Budget. Section 19. Annual report. Section 20. Accounts and audit. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Returns and information. Section 22. Power to exempt. Section 23. Delegation of powers. Section 24. Members and officers of the Commission to be public servants. Section 25. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 26. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Power to make regulations.
